name: rpg_api
description: Sistema de mural de missões estilo RPG demonstrando arquitetura de microserviços com FastAPI, API Gateway e HATEOAS.

scripts.start: concurrently -n "SHOP,HERO,QUEST,GATEWAY,FRONT" -c "magenta,red,green,blue,yellow" "cd backend/shop_service && /home/diasz/.dotnet/dotnet run" "cd backend/hero_service && uvicorn main:app --port 8001 --reload" "cd backend/quest_service && uvicorn main:app --port 8002 --reload" "cd backend/gateway && uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
